text_excerpt: Campaigns | Mark Pritchard Skip to main content Mark Pritchard MP The Wrekin Main navigation Home About Mark News About The Wrekin Campaigns In Parliament Contact Mark Pritchard MP The Wrekin Campaigns Postal Services in The Wrekin I am urging residents across The Wrekin to share their experiences of using local postal services. This follows my speech at a Westminster Hall debate in... Protecting Our Countryside I have joined thousands of local residents to oppose Telford & Wrekin Council’s draft Local Plan, which would see countryside bulldozed and hundreds of trees... 24/7 Emergency Care Services Staying at PRH The PRH will retain 24 hour, 7 day a week emergency care services. About 80% of the A&E services currently provided at the PRH will still be provided there...
